channel.title: Airbus — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Airbus (airbus).

item.title: CVE-2026-8474 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Possible to run a Cross Site Scripting request on the login API available on Stormshield SNS appliances.
item.description: A vulnerability was discovered on Stormshield Network Security * 4.3.0 to 4.3.41, * 4.8.0 to 4.8.15, * 5.0.0 to 5.0.5 It is possible to execute a reflected XSS attack on the login API available on Stormshield SNS appliance by executing a script on th…

item.title: CVE-2025-7024 · 7.3 HIGH — Local privilege escalation in Windows Server OS through installed Tetra Connectivity Server (TCS)
item.description: Incorrect Default Permissions vulnerability in AIRBUS PSS TETRA Connectivity Server on Windows Server OS allows Privilege Abuse. An attacker may execute arbitrary code with SYSTEM privileges if a user is tricked or directed to place a crafted file in…

item.title: CVE-2025-55108 · 10 CRITICAL 🌩️ — BMC Control-M/Agent default configuration does not enforce SSL/TLS allowing unauthorized actions and remote code execution
item.description: The Control-M/Agent is vulnerable to unauthenticated remote code execution, arbitrary file read and write and similar unauthorized actions when mutual SSL/TLS authentication is not enabled (i.e. in the default configuration). NOTE: * The vendor belie…

item.title: CVE-2025-55118 · 8.9 HIGH 🌩️ — BMC Control-M/Agent memory corruption in SSL/TLS communication
item.description: Memory corruptions can be remotely triggered in the Control-M/Agent when SSL/TLS communication is configured. The issue occurs in the following cases: * Control-M/Agent 9.0.20: SSL/TLS configuration is set to the non-default setting "use_openssl=n";…

item.title: CVE-2025-55117 · 6.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — BMC Control-M/Agent buffer overflow in SSL/TLS communication
item.description: A stack-based buffer overflow can be remotely triggered when formatting an error message in the Control-M/Agent when SSL/TLS communication is configured. The issue occurs in the following cases: * Control-M/Agent 9.0.20: SSL/TLS configuration is set…

item.title: CVE-2025-55116 · 9.3 CRITICAL — BMC Control-M/Agent buffer overflow local privilege escalation
item.description: A buffer overflow in the Control-M/Agent can lead to a local privilege escalation when an attacker has access to the system running the Agent. This vulnerability impacts the out-of-support Control-M/Agent versions 9.0.18 to 9.0.20 and potentially ear…

item.title: CVE-2025-55115 · 9.3 CRITICAL — BMC Control-M/Agent path traversal local privilege escalation
item.description: A path traversal in the Control-M/Agent can lead to a local privilege escalation when an attacker has access to the system running the Agent. This vulnerability impacts the out-of-support Control-M/Agent versions 9.0.18 to 9.0.20 and potentially earl…

item.title: CVE-2025-55114 · 6.9 MEDIUM 🌩️ — BMC Control-M/Agent improper IP address filtering order
item.description: The improper order of AUTHORIZED_CTM_IP validation in the Control-M/Agent, where the Control-M/Server IP address is validated only after the SSL/TLS handshake is completed, exposes the Control-M/Agent to vulnerabilities in the SSL/TLS implementation…

item.title: CVE-2025-55113 · 9.5 CRITICAL 🌩️ — BMC Control-M/Agent unescaped NULL byte in access control list checks
item.description: If the Access Control List is enforced by the Control-M/Agent and the C router is in use (default in Out-of-support Control-M/Agent versions 9.0.18 to 9.0.20 and potentially earlier unsupported versions; non-default but configurable using the JAVA_AR…

item.title: CVE-2025-55112 · 7.6 HIGH 🌩️ — BMC Control-M/Agent hardcoded Blowfish keys
item.description: Out-of-support Control-M/Agent versions 9.0.18 to 9.0.20 (and potentially earlier unsupported versions) that are configured to use the non-default Blowfish cryptography algorithm use a hardcoded key. An attacker with access to network traffic and to…

item.title: CVE-2025-55111 · 5.7 MEDIUM — BMC Control-M/Agent insecure default file permissions
item.description: Certain files with overly permissive permissions were identified in the out-of-support Control-M/Agent versions 9.0.18 to 9.0.20 and potentially earlier unsupported versions as well as in newer versions which were upgraded from an affected version. T…

item.title: CVE-2025-55110 · 5.7 MEDIUM — BMC Control-M/Agent hardcoded default keystore password
item.description: Control-M/Agents use a kdb or PKCS#12 keystore by default, and the default keystore password is well known and documented. An attacker with read access to the keystore could access sensitive data using this password.

item.title: CVE-2025-55109 · 9.5 CRITICAL 🌩️ — BMC Control-M/Agent default SSL/TLS configuration authenticated bypass
item.description: An authentication bypass vulnerability exists in the out-of-support Control-M/Agent versions 9.0.18 to 9.0.20 and potentially earlier unsupported versions when using an empty or default kdb keystore or a default PKCS#12 keystore. A remote attacker wi…

item.title: CVE-2019-10881 · 9.4 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Default hidden Privileged Account Vulnerability in multiple XEROX devices
item.description: Xerox AltaLink B8045/B8055/B8065/B8075/B8090, AltaLink C8030/C8035/C8045/C8055/C8070 with software releases before 103.xxx.030.32000 includes two accounts with weak hard-coded passwords which can be exploited and allow unauthorized access which canno…

item.title: CVE-2019-18567 · 6.1 MEDIUM — Bromium client - out of bound read results in race condition causing Kernel memory leaks or denial of service
item.description: Bromium client version 4.0.3.2060 and prior to 4.1.7 Update 1 has an out of bound read results in race condition causing Kernel memory leaks or denial of service.

item.title: CVE-2019-18568 · 8.1 HIGH — Avira Free Antivirus is proned to a local privilege escalation through the execution of kernel code from a restricted user.
item.description: Avira Free Antivirus 15.0.1907.1514 is prone to a local privilege escalation through the execution of kernel code from a restricted user.

item.title: CVE-2019-12091 · 7.8 HIGH — Netskope client command injections vulnerability
item.description: The Netskope client service, v57 before 57.2.0.219 and v60 before 60.2.0.214, running with NT\SYSTEM privilege, accepts network connections from localhost. The connection handling function in this service suffers from command injection vulnerability.…

item.title: CVE-2019-10882 · 5.5 MEDIUM — Netskope client buffer overflow vulnerability
item.description: The Netskope client service, v57 before 57.2.0.219 and v60 before 60.2.0.214, running with NT\SYSTEM privilege, accepts network connections from localhost. The connection handling function in this service suffers from a stack based buffer overflow in…

item.title: CVE-2019-10880 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: Within multiple XEROX products a vulnerability allows remote command execution on the Linux system, as the "nobody" user through a crafted "HTTP" request (OS Command Injection vulnerability in the HTTP interface). Depending upon configuration authent…
